framework.name: Zuckerberg's 'Every Business Needs AI Agent' Vision
framework.description: Meta's vision that every business will have AI agents for customer support and sales, similar to having email/website/social presence today. Aspirational market-making claim, not current reality. Relevant for understanding where platform companies want to push SMB AI adoption.
framework.raw_quote: every business in the future just like they have an email address and a website and the social media presence today I think every business is going to have a um an AI agent that their customers can talk to in the future

source.title: AI Agents Every Business Needs to Skyrocket Efficiency and Cut Costs
